title: 101 missiles
description: Russian X-101 missiles have become less noticeable, more powerful and resistant to EW. Colonel Alexander Zaruba, the chief scientist of the State Research Institute of Weapons Testing and Certification, said this at a briefing on the topic "Use of the Russian Air Force against Civilian Infrastructure: Technical and Humanitarian Aspects". According to him, the analysis of the debris of the last released by...

title: Attack attack
description: Ukraine's security service reports hit on oil and gas terminal in Russia's Krasnodar Krai Special Group Alpha, part of the Security Service of Ukraine (SSU), working with Special Operations Forces (SOF) and Defence Intelligence of Ukraine (DIU), has carried out successful strikes on the Tamannaftogas oil and gas terminal in Russia's Krasnodar Krai. description: 40 children remain without gas and water in occupied Oleshky, Kherson Oblast; 182 children in total in community Around 6,000 people, including 182 children, remain in the occupied Oleshky hromada. title: Casualties reported
description: May 2026 became the deadliest month for civilians in Ukraine in four years — UN In the past month, more civilians were killed and injured in Ukraine than in any other month in the past four years, the UN Monitoring Mission on Human Rights in Ukraine reported. title: Donetsk: Explosions reported
description: Russia reports third attack in a week on figures linked to war in Ukraine: former Donetsk People's Republic minister targeted – photos An explosion occurred at the Moscow residence of Andrei Pinchuk, the former so-called state security minister of the self-proclaimed DPR, after a courier delivered a parcel. Read the full article on our website

description: Ukrainian boxing champion Usyk visits White House, meets with Trump. Ukrainian heavyweight boxing champion Oleksandr Usyk met with U.S. President Donald Trump at the White House on June 12, according to a post shared by presidential communications adviser Margo Martin on X.

title: Kyiv: 2027 killed
description: UK sets 2027 deadline for full import ban on Russian diesel and jet fuel. The U.K. announced on June 12 that imports of diesel and jet fuel produced from Russian crude oil will be fully banned by Jan. 1, 2027, as part of broader efforts to cut off revenue streams funding Moscow's war against Ukraine.
description_en: UK sets 2027 deadline for full import ban on Russian diesel and jet fuel. The U.K. announced on June 12 that imports of diesel and jet fuel produced from Russian crude oil will be fully banned by Jan. 1, 2027, as part of broader efforts to cut off revenue streams funding Moscow's war against Ukraine.
description_uk: UK sets 2027 deadline for full import ban on Russian diesel and jet fuel. The U.K. announced on June 12 that imports of diesel and jet fuel produced from Russian crude oil will be fully banned by Jan. 1, 2027, as part of broader efforts to cut off revenue streams funding Moscow's war against Ukraine.

title: 300 drones launched
description: About 300 UAVs have flown over the Russian Federation and the occupied territories, preparing fiery content for the morning, - monitors. As a reminder, in June, Ukraine is already hitting Russia with hundreds of drones almost every day. On the night of June 11, at least 330 UAVs flew - this was already the fifth attack in a month with an indicator of 300+.
description_en: About 300 UAVs have flown over the Russian Federation and the occupied territories, preparing fiery content for the morning, - monitors. As a reminder, in June, Ukraine is already hitting Russia with hundreds of drones almost every day. On the night of June 11, at least 330 UAVs flew - this was already the fifth attack in a month with an indicator of 300+.
description_uk: На рф и оккупированные территории полетели около 300 БПЛА готовить огненный контент к утру, - мониторы Напомним, в июне Украина уже почти ежедневно бьет по россии сотнями дронов. В ночь на 11 июня полетело не менее 330 БПЛА - это была уже пятая атака за месяц с показателем 300+.
